title: wemmbu's nukes
description: this datpacks adds all the nukes wemmbu used in his videos and 2 more
body:
Wemmbu nukes Datapack
Wemmbu nukes is an explosive Minecraft datapack that gives you powerful TNT rods with devastating abilities. Inspired by creative destruction and strategic chaos, this datapack lets you summon TNT in spectacular ways — from towering columns that pierce the sky to carpet bombs that rain from above.
Carefully crafted for multiplayer mayhem, PvP chaos, and creative destruction, Wemmbu Stab puts the power of precision explosives in your hands with multiple rod types, each with unique abilities and limited uses.
It's lightweight, server-friendly, and designed to add explosive fun to any Minecraft world.
Features
Four Unique TNT Rods:

Stab Rod - Summons a massive TNT column from bedrock to sky limit where you're looking (5 uses)
Bomb Rod - Deploys a devastating carpet bomb 70 blocks above your target (2 uses)
Homing Rod - Launches smart TNT that locks onto and follows the nearest player (3 uses)
Instant Rod - Creates an instant explosion right on your target with no delay (2 uses)

Smart Raycast Targeting:

Aim at blocks or players up to 40 blocks away
Visual particle trails show where you're aiming
Each rod has unique particle effects (end rod, flame, sonic boom, electric spark)

Durability System:

Each rod has limited uses tracked with custom NBT data
Visual lore updates show remaining uses with color-coded warnings
Rods break when depleted with appropriate feedback

Immersive Feedback:

Custom sounds for each rod type
Explosive particle effects
Chat messages with color-coded alerts
Sound effects for use, breaking, and warnings

Easy Administration:

Simple /function stab:give/... commands to obtain rods
Version tracking and load confirmation
Clean scoreboard system for tracking uses

How to Use

Get a Rod: Use commands like /function stab:give/stab_rod or create them with crafting recipes
Aim: Look at your target (block or player)
Right-Click: Use the carrot on a stick to activate
Watch the Chaos: Your TNT ability triggers with spectacular effects!

Each rod has different behaviors:

Stab Rod: Creates a vertical column of TNT at the targeted location
Bomb Rod: Spawns a widespread carpet bomb pattern from above
Homing Rod: Locks onto the nearest player and pursues them
Instant Rod: Immediate explosion on the targeted entity

Installation

Download the datapack
Place it in your world's datapacks folder
Run /reload or restart the server
You should see: [Wemmbu Stab] Loaded! (v2.0 - New Rods)

Requirements

Minecraft Java Edition 1.20.5+
No mods required — pure vanilla datapack!

Who is Wemmbu Stab for?

Players who love explosive PvP combat
Server owners looking for fun custom items
Map makers creating adventure/combat scenarios
Anyone who wants creative destruction mechanics
Groups who enjoy chaotic multiplayer battles

Credits
Frqme – Datapack creator and developer
